confidence_rationale: Video shows only the preparation phase of the task. No actual suture placement through Penrose drain marks or knot tying was observed. Unable to assess the core components of Task 4.
cannot_determine: Suture placement accuracy at drain marks
Whether task was completed beyond preparation phase
technique_summary: Video shows only extensive suture preparation phase (63 seconds) which is longer than typical expert total completion time (60-100s). The actual suturing and knot tying phases were not captured in this video segment.
strengths: Proper extracorporeal technique visible during prep phase
improvement_suggestions: Reduce preparation time - 63 seconds for prep alone exceeds many expert total times
Video incomplete - unable to assess core task components
